SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.providers.flight

Class FlightSqlTableProvider

java.lang.Object
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.providers.RustTableProvider
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.providers.flight.FlightSqlTableProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public final class FlightSqlTableProvider extends RustTableProvider
A TableProvider backed by a remote Flight SQL service.

This wraps datafusion_table_providers::flight::FlightTableFactory with the bundled FlightSqlDriver. Each FlightSqlTableProvider corresponds to a single SQL query baked in at construction time (via FlightSqlTableProvider.Builder.query(String)); the Flight service runs that query and streams results back. For multi-table federation with filter / join pushdown, see FlightSqlFederatedCatalog instead. 

try (FlightSqlTableProvider taxi = FlightSqlTableProvider.builder()
        .endpoint("http://localhost:32010")
        .query("SELECT * FROM taxi_trips")
        .header("x-tenant", "acme")
        .build();
    SessionContext ctx = new SessionContext()) {
    ctx.registerTable("taxi", taxi);
    ctx.sql("SELECT count(*) FROM taxi").show();
}
See Also:
